top_signals.title: French jet on NATO mission shoots down drone in Latvian airspace
top_signals.summary: Military drones straying into the airspace of Russia’s neighbors have stoked concerns that Russia’s war in Ukraine is spilling over NATO’s borders.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Christine Lagarde: Women and leadership: widening the pipeline
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried officially files for a presidential pardon from Trump
top_signals.summary: Sam Bankman-Fried is pressing ahead with his bid for a presidential pardon, even after President Trump said he has no plans to grant clemency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
